entries.invocation: track-weapons3 (user directive 13:58Z: TP probe + subcategory taxonomy + ratio threshold)

before.note: no true-positive imagery indexed; every flag in user datasets was FP-or-toy and the track could not be tested for TP-vs-FP separation.

after.tp_probe_dataset: weaponprobe (166 held-out OI-validation weapon images, 8 subcategories + 1 gap, indexed into the gallery)

entries.delta: Established the TP-vs-user-FP separation measurement that did not exist (overall AP 0.938; firearms clean). Proposed the per-tier ratio threshold with 95% Wilson CI. Deepened the subcategory taxonomy as versioned DATA (+41 violation prompts). Surfaced 2 headline weak subcategories (ordnance/generic = representation limit, not threshold bug) + 1 untestable gap. No retrain: measured failures are not spec/threshold-fixable and firearms already pass.

entries.invocation: track-nudity3 (user directive 13:58Z: TP probe + subcategory taxonomy + ratio threshold)

before.review_tier_instrument: Marqo head only (a VIOLATION detector) — scored swimwear in the SAME 0.05-0.15 band as mannequins; on a 202-image all-TP probe it flagged 13/202 review (colour-prior FPs, not the swimwear) and 0 violation
before.note: no review-tier TP imagery indexed; the track could not be tested for TP-vs-FP separation. Marqo p cannot separate the review tier (swimwear p50 0.056 == mannequin p50 0.056, measured).

after.tp_probe_dataset: nudityprobe (202 local Unsplash review-tier TPs by keyword-join, T4-compliant, indexed into the gallery): swimwear 77 / lingerie 16 / underwear 4 / bare-chest 45 / mannequin-control 60
after.taxonomy: moderation.json nudity.review_subcategories (6 subcats: swimwear/lingerie/underwear/bare-chest-male/artistic-figure/medical-context) + control_never_flag=[mannequin-statue], as versioned DATA
after.review_instrument: NudityReviewScorer — prompt-ensemble margin over pecore-s16-384 embeddings (TRACKS T1, ~0 cost); NOT auto-wired into runtime yet (earn-it, TRACKS T2)
after.tau_violation_basis: Marqo argmax; published 98.56%/20k; NOT locally reproduced (EVAL DATA LAW); safe-corpus Marqo p99=0.175 << 0.50

entries.delta: Built the review-tier TP probe + separation measurement that did not exist. SWIMWEAR SEPARATES (AP 0.111 CI 0.063-0.18; R@5%=0.57 recall-first) and the mannequin never-flag control PASSES (0 flags at tau). Proposed per-tier ratio thresholds (review margin tau 0.0339@5%FP / 0.0658@1%FP; violation Marqo 0.50 benchmark-cited). Added the subcategory taxonomy as versioned DATA + a live calibratable review instrument. HEADLINED the honest failure: lingerie/underwear/bare-chest do NOT separate on the shared embedding (distilled head owed, D-nudity-review-distill); violation recall stays benchmark-cited, un-reproducible under EVAL DATA LAW. Complementary to the parallel §10 NudeNet round (both preserved; recommend taxonomy dedupe).
artifacts: src/imgtag/data/moderation.json nudity entry (taxonomy + platt + tau + fit)

entries.invocation: track-safety (sole owner after predecessor/successor consolidation; user directive 13:20Z person-down + danger escalation, 13:58Z TP-probe law)

before.note: no safety track; 'people lying down + danger escalation' unbuilt and unmeasured.

after.instrument: embedding-space two-margin scorer (LYING x DANGER) over pecore-s16-384, ~0 extra FLOPs; no pose model (justified vs measured gap, ADR-10)
after.ground_truth: COCO val2017 keypoint-geometry (torso<=30deg AND leg<=45deg) INTERSECT human-caption consensus (>=2 of 5 captions, animal-guarded) = 41 lying pos vs 4058 doubly-verified neg; chance AP 0.010
after.lying_ap_range: 0.453 (no animal negs) - 0.534 (with); NOT fold-stable at n=41 - range reported, never 0.53 alone
after.occlusion_headline: heavily-occluded (no usable keypoints) stratum is NOT the worst case (>= geometry-ambiguous); a keypoint pose model = ~0 here by construction
after.alert_measurable: n=1 in all of COCO val2017 (000000354307 injured man) - scorer DOES tier it alert; sanity check, NOT a metric
after.tp_probe_dataset: data/safety-probe (797 Unsplash policy-safe imgs; successor labels.json: 57 alert_tp + 118 person_down + 72 injury + 25 danger + 517 destruction + 8 sunbathing) - indexing HELD for quiet-window ALL-CLEAR
after.moderation_json: STAGED via track_spec() (reader-compat: ALERT_PHRASES combined person-down+danger, GROUND_LEVEL_FP negatives kill b-daemon boots-on-ice class) but WITHHELD from data/moderation.json until alert separation proven (b-daemon withhold stands)

entries.delta: Built the safety track from zero: two-margin embedding scorer + real COCO ground truth from keypoint-geometry INTERSECT caption-consensus (41 pos). MEASURED lying AP 0.45-0.53 and the requirement's hardest clause - OCCLUSION robustness - as the strongest result (hidden stratum 0.79-0.93, >= ambiguous, where a pose model is ~0 by construction). Ablation recorded against ego: prompt ADDITIONS made AP slightly worse (0.453->0.433); all real gain came from fixing LABELS (geometry-only -> human-consensus), not more prompts. Danger weak+said-so (AP 0.144, n=19). Alert essentially unmeasurable (n=1, caught). Reconciled predecessor+successor lanes: corrected alert 0->1 and occlusion numbers in FIT+report; preserved the successor's WITHHOLD + labels.json. Coordinated alert boundary with track-violence and the danger regex with b-daemon. Spec staged-not-shipped per the standing withhold.
artifacts: data/safety-probe/ (797 imgs; labels.json from successor, preserved)
blocked: index safetyprobe + measure alert TP-vs-benign-FP separation per subcategory (quiet window)
fit precision-first tau_alert + recall-first tau_review with bootstrap CI (same block)
ship categories.safety to moderation.json only if separation beats the benign-FP band

entries.invocation: track-drugs (user directive 17:2xZ: 7-subcategory deepening + confidence-correctness autoresearch + TP-probe law). Follows the v2 4-defect refit b-daemon/b-app routed.

before.note: v2 refit end state: separation measured only as AP; no AUROC/ECE/Brier/Wilson; subcategories powder/injection/psychedelics/paraphernalia had zero labelled TP and no separation number.

prompts_promoted: a cannabis vape cartridge and battery
a dab rig for smoking cannabis concentrate
cannabis wax concentrate on a dab tool
a tray of ground cannabis and rolling papers
a glass meth pipe with a bulbous end
a bong with murky bong water
a rolled banknote next to lines of white powder
a pile of ecstasy pills with stamped logos
loose pills and a plastic baggie on a nightclub table
a cotton filter, spoon and syringe drug kit
a sheet of LSD blotter paper with printed squares
small ziplock baggies of drugs and a digital scale
drugs, cash and a scale arranged for a sale
bags of drugs displayed on a table for dealing
prompts_rejected: a razor blade cutting lines of cocaine on a mirror
a person snorting powder through a straw
a spoon cooking heroin over a lighter flame
ketamine powder in a small bag
a digital scale, baggies and cash on a table
after.tp_probe_dataset: drugprobe (17 hand-verified drug imgs in drug-probe/strong, indexed) — satisfies the TP-probe law; separation now measured against it

entries.delta: AUROC 0.9968->0.9979, violation FP rate 1.06%->0.44% (159->66 of 15010), drug-violation recall .88->.94 — a strict win (better separation, higher recall, LOWER FP). Added the confidence-CORRECTNESS metric suite the user law asked for (AUROC/ECE/Brier/Wilson-CI/per-subcat separation) where before there were only rates. Promoted 8 of 13 candidate subcategory prompts under a separation gate; REJECTED 5 over-generic ones that lifted the FP band — the gate is the result as much as the promotions. HONEST CEILING SURFACED: only cannabis(11)+smoking_apparatus(6) have any labelled TP, so 6 subcategories carry unmeasured production-coverage prompts; separation is already ~0.998 on the labelled set, so future gains need LABELS (esp. cocaine/heroin/meth), not more prompts.
